You are working in /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service (NestJS/TypeScript monorepo).

## Your Task
Fix ESLint `custom-rules/require-object-params` violations for Jira ticket RECO-689.
Ticket URL: https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-689

## Context
- Current branch: `RECO-660-fix-color-match-util-eslint`
- You must create a NEW branch from this branch (NOT from main)
- Branch name format: `RECO-689-<kebab-summary>`
- Commit format: `RECO-689: <imperative description>`

## ESLint Rule
`custom-rules/require-object-params` вАФ all exported functions must use a single object destructuring parameter instead of positional params.

**Pattern:**
```typescript
// вЭМ Before
export function myFn(id: string, name: string): void {}
// вЬЕ After
export function myFn({ id, name }: { id: string; name: string }): void {}
```

## Steps

### 1. Find the target file
Run ESLint to find files with violations:
```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 src/ --format=compact 2>&1 | grep "require-object-params" | head -30
```
Pick an appropriate file for RECO-689 that hasn't been fixed yet. Focus on util files or service files.

### 2. Create branch
```bash
git checkout -b RECO-689-<descriptive-name>
```
Branch from current branch `RECO-660-fix-color-match-util-eslint`.

### 3. Run ESLint on target file
```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 <target-file> 2>&1
```

### 4. Fix violations
- Change positional params to `{ param }: { param: type }` destructuring
- Update ALL internal calls to changed functions
- Find ALL callers: `grep -r "functionName" src/ test/ --include="*.ts" -l`
- Update every call site
- Do NOT use `{ ...param }` spread shortcuts

### 5. Update tests
Find and update all test files that call changed functions.

### 6. Run tests
```bash
npm run test:unit -- --testPathPatterns="<pattern>" 2>&1
```

### 7. Run type-check
```bash
npm run type-check 2>&1
```

### 8. Verify ESLint
```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 <changed-files> 2>&1
```

### 9. Commit (only relevant files вАФ NOT .husky/pre-push)
```bash
git add <specific-files-only>
git commit -m "RECO-689: <description>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

### 10. Push
```bash
git push -u origin RECO-689-<branch-name>
```

### 11. Create DRAFT PR
Base = `RECO-660-fix-color-match-util-eslint` (NOT main).

```bash
gh pr create --draft --base RECO-660-fix-color-match-util-eslint --title "RECO-689: ..." --body "..."
```

Use this PR body template:
```
### Ticket рЯРЧ

- [ ] I've updated the documentation.

### Description / Ticket Summary рЯРЩ

```

## Critical Rules
- NEVER modify `.husky/pre-push`
- NEVER use relative imports (use `@utils/`, `@modules/`, etc.)
- NO comments in code
- All functions need explicit return types
- Do NOT use `{ ...spread }` as shortcut
